title: UK hopes to lure expats back from the UAE as war challenges Dubai's appeal
summary_full: The U.K. is seeking to lure British residents back from the UAE as war in the Middle East rattles confidence in Dubai’s safe‑haven image.
summary_public: The U.K. is seeking to lure British residents back from the UAE as war in the Middle East rattles confidence in Dubai’s safe‑haven image.
